steps.text: The light fades. Both of them lie in the shallows, spent, neither able to rise. A stalemate.

steps.speaker: Naruto
steps.text: I told you... I'd never give up on you. Even if I have to chase you to the ends of the earth.

steps.speaker: Sasuke
steps.text: ...Heh. You really are an idiot. ...Maybe that's why you'll be Hokage one day.
"The cycle of hatred is not broken by a single battle — but by the choice to reach out a hand when the world demands a fist."
Naruto looks up at the Hokage Rock as the sun rises over the Leaf. The journey to truly protect this world has only just begun.
— THANK YOU FOR PLAYING —  Naruto: Shinobi Chronicles  |  [ A teaser stirs for the next generation... ]
